summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DUK is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $126.54. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 23.8%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $133.29 and a significant trendline confluence around $132.94 (formed by 7 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
